tweets.text: .@WPatrickMurphy highlights the United States' enduring commitment to @ASEAN and previews the annual #ASEAN-related ministerial meetings in #Singapore. Read about it here. https://t.co/7rFdVHDRHZ #ASEAN
.@statedeptspox comments on new @ECAatState initiatives to advance #ReligiousFreedom. #IRF2018 https://t.co/a7ZfYZjS2S

.@statedeptspox: We’re excited that at the #AIDS2018 Conference in Amsterdam, @PEPFAR announced several African countries are now on pace to reach HIV epidemic control by the year 2020 with the U.S. government support. https://t.co/LaZog2wern

Check out this fact sheet highlighting the $113.5 million in new U.S. economic initiatives in the #IndoPacific, supporting foundational areas of the future -- digital economy, energy, and infrastructure: https://t.co/OyyK8VWDh0
ICYMI: @SecPompeo delivered remarks @USChamber today highlighting America's economic vision for a free and open #IndoPacific. Read the full remarks: https://t.co/ge6uvAhjGv https://t.co/3VWWbC5vgp

.@SecPompeo spoke to @MCaruso_Cabrera and @CNBC today about #Iran, the @POTUS administration's new initiatives in the #IndoPacific region, and #NorthKorea. Watch the full interview here: https://t.co/QGS5ybjKSd
This afternoon, @SecPompeo welcomed #Oman’s Foreign Minister Yusuf bin Alawi to the State Department. @MofaOman @USEmbMuscat https://t.co/R57Y3abmgs

.@USAIDMarkGreen at #IndoPacificBizForum: America’s #IndoPacific strategy offers our partners an enterprise-driven future, and private enterprise is the greatest force known to man for lifting lives and building communities. https://t.co/UKPMuOYmkm

.@USAIDMarkGreen at #IndoPacificBizForum: The purpose of our foreign assistance must be ending its need to exist. We believe in inherent desire of every country to lead their own bright future...and private enterprise is single most powerful force for accelerating self-reliance. https://t.co/Y76NCHAmZo

.@SecPompeo at #IndoPacificBizForum: We aspire to a regional order of independent nations that can defend their people and compete fairly in the international arena. We stand ready to enhance the security of our partners and to assist them in developing their economies. https://t.co/aEP2rcW4e5

.@SecPompeo at #IndoPacificBizForum: I am announcing $113 million in new U.S. initiatives to support foundational areas of future: digital economy, energy & infrastructure. @POTUS expects our commitment to generate greater support for a free and open #IndoPacific. https://t.co/XY88qqpmfn

.@SecPompeo at #IndoPacificBizForum: Our #IndoPacific vision excludes no nation. We seek to work with anyone to promote a free and open Indo-Pacific, so long as that cooperation adheres to the highest standards that our citizens demand. https://t.co/BZghsvXmde

.@SecPompeo at #IndoPacificBizForum: The successes of the past and present are just a prelude to the future. I am here to say emphatically that the Trump Administration is expanding our economic engagement in the #IndoPacific. https://t.co/A0LL78vP8O

Starting soon! @SecPompeo will deliver keynote remarks on "America's Indo-Pacific Vision" at the @USChamber's #IndoPacificBizForum. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz and https://t.co/4PAwVBoTVX. https://t.co/1Q08Al9g5m

.@SecPompeo will deliver keynote remarks on "America's Indo-Pacific Vision" at the @USChamber's #IndoPacificBizForum on Monday, July 30 at 9:15 a.m. ET. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz and https://t.co/4PAwVBoTVX. Learn more: https://t.co/ptjpRn38tv https://t.co/OqvhhdtrVq

.@SecPompeo will keynote the Indo-Pacific Business Forum on July 30, speaking about the U.S. economic vision for the #IndoPacific. Learn more about our long-standing economic engagement in the Indo-Pacific region. https://t.co/dZ2Huridcg #IndoPacificBizForum

.@ECAatState spotlights exchange participants who continually show us how individuals with disabilities can live #WithoutLimits. Hear their stories and learn how @StateDept exchanges help showcase America’s spirit of equal access for all. #ADA28 

https://t.co/fjNRFNaOl1

This Week @StateDept: @SecPompeo spoke in support of Iranian voices @Reagan_Library; met with our Australian allies, along with SecDef Mattis; hosted the first-ever #IRFMinisterial; and more. https://t.co/ZfnAxiBJqI https://t.co/miGGvamItW
This morning, @SecPompeo welcomed #Tunisia's Foreign Minister @Jhinaoui_MAE to the State Department. https://t.co/czqcFNMIKU

.@USUN Amb. Haley: Denial of #ReligiousFreedom is ultimate authoritarianism. Limiting or denying #ReligiousFreedom is a key way for gov'ts to exert control over their people. Authoritarian gov'ts see independent religious communities as threats to their power. #IRFMinisterial https://t.co/Au8jW2huti

.@USUN Amb. Haley: There is an undeniable connection between the violation of human rights and threats to international security...real peace cannot be achieved in isolation from human rights. This is especially true of violations of religious liberty.  #IRFMinisterial https://t.co/qFqtPZDosH

.@SecPompeo at #IRFMinisterial: #ReligiousFreedom is an essential building block for all free societies. Ensuring religious freedom around the world is a key priority of the Trump Administration's foreign policy. https://t.co/plcuoI85ez

Dep. Sec. Sullivan: I was humbled to meet with survivors of religious persecution at #IRFMinisterial. These brave individuals stand with grace & courage, but no one should suffer what they've endured. #ReligiousFreedom must be advanced so stories like theirs are repeated no more. https://t.co/Mejdtlc6A1

.@VP Pence at #IRFMinisterial: In America, we prove every day that #ReligiousFreedom buttresses all other rights. The American people will always cherish religious freedom, and we will always stand with people across the world who stand for their faith. https://t.co/eZNr6NLr8i

.@VP Pence at #IRFMInisterial: In Europe, where #religiousfreedom was born, religious intolerance is on the rise. Just 70 years after the Holocaust, attacks on Jews, even Holocaust survivors, are growing at alarming rate. These acts of violence, hatred & anti-Semitism must end. https://t.co/FQQhwQ5bvo

.@VP Pence at #IRFMinisterial: We recognize that the people of #Iran enjoy few, if any freedoms, least of all the #religiousfreedom. Christians, Jews, Sunnis, Baha'is, and other religious minority groups are denied the basic rights enjoyed by the Shia majority. https://t.co/I5ElQfsyRs

.@VP Pence at #IRFMinisterial: We have much work to do. For today, tragically a stunning 83% of the world’s population live in nations where #religiousfreedom is either threatened or banned. https://t.co/e3XP6Y7hGv

.@VP Pence at #IRFMinisterial: The right to believe or not believe is the most fundamental of freedoms. When #religiousfreedom is denied or destroyed, we know that other freedoms are imperiled. That’s why the United States stands for religious freedom yesterday, today and always. https://t.co/uuKW1ungEz

.@VP Pence at #IRFMinisterial: The United States is a nation of faith, and #religiousfreedom is a top priority of this Administration…America has always and will always lead the world by our example. https://t.co/ZiULC7t35g

.@SecPompeo at #IRFMinisterial: We are undertaking new initiatives to promote religious pluralism, protect the rights of religious minorities, and promote and defend #ReligiousFreedom around the world. https://t.co/p8H1EVui98

.@SecPompeo at #IRFMinisterial: The United States advances #ReligiousFreedom in our foreign policy because it is not exclusively an American right. It is a God-given, universal right bestowed on all of mankind. https://t.co/9Yt5HE8Mgu

.@USAIDMarkGreen: This ministerial matters because intolerance has all too often driven violence and oppression...the need for vigilance in pushing back against religious intolerance is itself essential to the survival of liberty. #IRFMinisterial https://t.co/t56uImpJ8F

.@StateDept's Brian Hook at #IRFMinisterial: The Iranian regime has institutionalized a campaign of harassment and incarceration against religious minorities...in #Iran, those who dare to exercise their fundamental right to #ReligiousFreedom suffer terribly. https://t.co/XyXSAvt2Sj
.@USinHolySee Ambassador Callista Gingrich at #IRFMinisterial: #ReligiousFreedom and women’s rights are integral to building peaceful, prosperous, and more secure societies. https://t.co/CdWlIJ66CJ

Assistant Secretary Michelle Giuda introduced Ji Hyeon-A, a victim of religious persecution in #DPRK, at #IRFMinisterial. Ms. Ji shared her courageous and heartbreaking story that reinforced the importance of #ReligiousFreedom. https://t.co/iGds4xwIK6
.@SecPompeo before Senate Foreign Relations Committee: @POTUS has stated his firm conviction that diplomacy and engagement are preferable to conflict and hostility. https://t.co/zRkDGQnT3V
At the #IRFMinisterial, @MarkBurnettTV encourages religious leaders to learn how to harness media to motivate action during his panel discussion with @Greta. https://t.co/2Bm0y93OqC
.@MarkBurnettTV comments on the religious reconciliation in Northern Ireland during a panel with @Greta at the #IRFMinisterial. https://t.co/QrCqJjX0Re

Deputy Secretary Sullivan at #IRFMinisterial: #ReligiousFreedom is vitally important to the U.S. and the Trump administration. It is fundamental to our democracy and holds us together. Whatever our differences may be, we are unified in having the freedom to differ. https://t.co/j0kmbWvPeO

.@USUN Amb. Haley: If one were to judge every nation’s commitment to the Palestinian people by the words that are spoken at #UNSC and #UNGA one would come away with an extremely distorted picture. There’s no end to speeches on their behalf…Talk is cheap. https://t.co/WnBXCQHWfj

.@USUN Amb. Haley: The terrorist flaming swastika kites that have crossed over from Gaza into #Israel have damaged or destroyed 7,500 acres of land...10 times the entire land area of Paris. If it was happening to any of our countries, there’d be quite a lot of discussion on it. https://t.co/77EMmbCpws

This week, @SecPompeo is hosting the #IRFMinisterial, the first-ever Ministerial to advance #religiousfreedom around the world. Secretary Pompeo and @VP Pence will deliver remarks on July 26. Read more. https://t.co/1FtXpmZNvM

.@SecPompeo and @DeptofDefense Sec. Mattis hosted Ministers @JulieBishopMP and @MarisePayne on July 23-24 for #AUSMIN. The U.S.-Australia alliance is steadfast and enduring, and underpinned by a deep alignment of mutual interests & shared values. https://t.co/C6DequbKDT #mateship

.@StateDeptSpox: @SecPompeo and the U.S. will host first-ever #IRFministerial to advance #ReligiousFreedom, which will reaffirm the international community’s commitment to religious freedom and identify ways to advance shared goals. https://t.co/sza0xWDS7N

.@StateDeptSpox: The U.S. government condemns the ongoing violence and intimidation by the Ortega-controlled armed groups in #Nicaragua. We join the international community in calling for early, free, fair, and transparent elections and the protection of #humanrights. https://t.co/AfidZsLMYt
.@StateDeptSpox: On Monday, July 30 @USChamber will host the Indo-Pacific Business Forum including keynote remarks by @SecPompeo on America’s Indo-Pacific economic vision. https://t.co/dum2IZk15p

.@StateDeptSpox: The State Department welcomes our newest Assistant Secretary, @AsstSecStateAF Tibor Nagy, a retired Foreign Service Officer who spent 32 years in government service including more than 20 years in assignments across #Africa. https://t.co/zPdolBUOqY

.@DeptofDefense Sec. Mattis with @SecPompeo, @JulieBishopMP and @MarisePayne: #Australia has been an unwavering friend, standing with us through thick and thin. I’m confident our enduring and unflappable #mateship will continue to grow and flourish for another 100 years. #AUSMIN https://t.co/7OQAaiXQkG

.@SecPompeo with @DeptofDefense Secretary Mattis and Ministers @JulieBishopMP and @MarisePayne: We’re proud to call #Australia one of our best friends and strongest allies. We will continue to work closely together on a range of key bilateral and global issues. #AUSMIN #Mateship https://t.co/VbjJEoFMzT
.@IRF_Ambassador Sam Brownback: We can and will advance #ReligiousFreedom. Let's get it done. #IRFMinisterial https://t.co/u9UC7GA8TM
.@IRF_Ambassador Sam Brownback: The lack of religious freedom anywhere is a threat to peace, prosperity, and stability everywhere. #IRFMinisterial https://t.co/teU9lc5XI8
.@IRF_Ambassador Sam Brownback: #ReligiousFreedom truly is for everyone. It's a right given by God. #IRFMinisterial https://t.co/FsiGeGbs5M
.@SecPompeo on the continued success of operations to defeat ISIS in #Syria. Read the Secretary's full statement. https://t.co/qGm4we4yKE
Today, @SecPompeo met with #Australia's Foreign Minister @JulieBishopMP in Palo Alto, California. #AUSMIN #USwithAUS #Mateship https://t.co/NrFGXa43hA

Auschwitz survivor Irene Weiss delivers remarks on #ReligiousFreedom and lights a memorial candle to honor victims of religious persecution during a ceremony at the @HolocaustMuseum. #IRFMinisterial https://t.co/tmAUXA3D6s
Today, @IRF_Ambassador Sam Brownback delivered remarks on #ReligiousFreedom at the @HolocaustMuseum. #IRFMinisterial https://t.co/gsTqXiQ98L
.@SecPompeo: The United States condemns the oppression levied on the Iranian people by those who rule unjustly. https://t.co/XKX7ziy6hr
.@SecPompeo: The #Iran regime’s ideology has led many Iranians to be angry they cannot call their homeland a “normal” country. https://t.co/kKlNsiiMQY
.@SecPompeo: At the same time #Iran’s regime is trying to convince Europe to stay in the nuclear deal, they’re covertly plotting terrorist attacks in the heart of Europe. https://t.co/qDFFA1wsEP
.@SecPompeo: The Trump Administration dreams the same dreams for the people of #Iran as you do. https://t.co/yEknmKqlw7
.@SecPompeo: Regime mismanagement has led to the rial plummeting in value. A third of Iranian youth are unemployed and a third of Iranians live below the poverty line. https://t.co/ZcnjvYxANj
STARTING SOON: Go to https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz or https://t.co/4PAwVBoTVX to watch @SecPompeo’s remarks “Supporting Iranian Voices” at 6p PT/9p ET. https://t.co/tpkKUUmVBT

TONIGHT at 6p PT/9p ET: @SecPompeo will deliver remarks on “Supporting Iranian Voices” at the @Reagan_Library. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz and https://t.co/4PAwVBoTVX https://t.co/sPoJXIwmOS

The Iranian people are expressing their frustration with their government’s corruption and mismanagement. Tomorrow, July 22, 6p PT/9p ET, @SecPompeo will make remarks on “Supporting Iranian Voices.” Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz and https://t.co/4PAwVBoTVX https://t.co/sEnKsQ8b63

Ambassador Deborah L. Birx is leading the U.S. delegation to the 22nd International @AIDS_conference in Amsterdam from July 20-27, where she will provide remarks at the conference and meet with key partners of @PEPFAR. https://t.co/XMxElcgNcu

As @POTUS stated: “We stand in total solidarity with the Iranian regime’s longest-suffering victims: its own people.” This Sunday, July 22, 6p PT/9p ET, @SecPompeo will make remarks on “Supporting Iranian Voices.” Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz and https://t.co/4PAwVBoTVX https://t.co/kmb5SwSQHY

.@State_IO Asst. Sec. Moley: I want to say how proud and privileged I am to work with @StateDRL Ambassador Mike Kozak and the real champion who is strong enough to speak out and say we are not going to go along to get along and that is @USUN Ambassador Haley. https://t.co/f4fHDLeomF

.@SecPompeo will deliver remarks on “Supporting Iranian Voices” at the @Reagan_Library on Sunday, July 22 at 6PM PT. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz and https://t.co/4PAwVBoTVX. https://t.co/sQmNkODsra

.@StateDRL Ambassador Kozak: Promoting #humanrights has never been dependent upon the @UN. Our policy going forward will be to continue to call out governments that violate human rights. https://t.co/xCHD8c3jRq

Today, @StateDept released its Investment Climate Statements for 2018. Economic officers at U.S. embassies & missions prepare these annual reports analyzing 170 foreign markets to help U.S. companies make informed business decisions about foreign markets. https://t.co/8OuxByhjxP

Today, we recognize Nelson #MandelaDay and his service. Read more about how programs such as the Mandela Washington Fellowship for Young African Leaders & the Young African Leaders Initiative (YALI) continue to honor his legacy through service. #Mandela100 https://t.co/ZjH8D4808n
The G7 foreign ministers issued the following statement in advance of the anniversary of the downing of Malaysian Airlines Flight #MH17: https://t.co/TU7zCHKtL0
.@USUN Amb. Haley: The U.S. does more for human rights, both inside the @UN, and around the world, then any other country.  And we will continue to do that. https://t.co/CwpnoCrB7U

Today at approximately 4 PM ET, @USUN Ambassador Nikki Haley will deliver remarks on the “U.S. Withdrawal from the @UN Human Rights Council: Impact and Next Steps” at @Heritage. Watch at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz and https://t.co/4PAwVBoTVX. https://t.co/9T0stKMbIH

As the world prepares for the #WorldCupFinal, find out how @ECAatState brings people together and builds partnerships through #SportsDiplomacy. https://t.co/hAKd3c6cRr https://t.co/IPNt9KAsqc

This Week at State: @SecPompeo travels to #Japan, #Vietnam, #Afghanistan, and #UAE, and joins @POTUS for #NATOSummit; @StateDept hosts #AGOA2018; @SecPompeo visits #Mexico, and more. https://t.co/EsGTrQcJHh https://t.co/gWM8Og8fI1

.@SecPompeo: The U.S. will continue to work closely w/ #Mexico across a broad range of shared agendas, including our economic relationship, border and security issues, and the common regional and global priorities that each of our two countries hold dear. https://t.co/HRQpzSQWks https://t.co/kus4e8CggA

Did you know the Royal Thai Police unit which played a key role in the #ThailandCaveRescue has regularly undergone U.S.-led training on medical evacuation skills and tactics at a @StateINL academy? Read the story: https://t.co/fTbQlSG2iu

This afternoon, @SecPompeo met with Mexican Foreign Secretary @LVidegaray during a joint press availability in Mexico City. Read more about the Secretary's travel to #Mexico: https://t.co/GHdbwdNQOw https://t.co/2QNaHEfGUb

.@SecPompeo accompanied @POTUS to the #NATOSummit, where Allies discussed increased defense spending and burden sharing, enhanced deterrence and defense, and NATO’s strengthened efforts to fight terrorism. Read about their participation in the Summit. https://t.co/FdX83ohhUq

.@SecPompeo & NATO Sec. Gen. @jensstoltenberg hosted a Global @Coalition to Defeat ISIS Meeting at NATO HQ. The Coalition discussed importance of the enduring defeat of ISIS in #Iraq & #Syria, & the Coalition’s collective denial of ISIS’s global ambitions. https://t.co/yjI3QiWteZ

Deputy Secretary Sullivan at #AGOA2018: The @POTUS Trump Administration places great importance on our relationship with #Africa, and sees genuine promise in the prospects for enhanced trade relationships with our partners. https://t.co/h16lGYnaVH
